heading: Grant authorization
label: 10511 Grant authorization
text: The Attorney General may make funds available under this subchapter to States and units of local government, or combinations thereof, to carry out all or a substantial part of a program or project intended to develop or improve the capability to analyze deoxyribonucleic acid (referred to in this subchapter as “DNA”) in a forensic laboratory.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3796kk of Title 42
Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 2601 and is classified to .section 2401 of Pub. L. 90–351section 10541 of this title
